requirements.summary: Redesign the login/authentication section with improved visual layout featuring school branding, welcoming content, and maroon/gold theme styling
acceptanceCriteria: The login section displays the school name 'Suraj Navodaya' prominently above the login button
The Internet Identity login button is styled with the maroon and gold color theme
A welcoming description or tagline is visible near the login area
The login section is centered and visually consistent with the app's existing maroon/gold design system
Login functionality (Internet Identity) continues to work correctly after the UI changes

file_operations.description: Create a new LoginScreen component that displays a centered authentication view with the school name 'Suraj Navodaya', school emblem from frontend/public/assets/generated/navodaya-emblem.dim_128x128.png, a welcoming tagline describing the app, and a prominent Internet Identity login button styled with the maroon and gold theme. Use the useInternetIdentity hook for authentication. Apply Tailwind classes using the maroon-600, maroon-700, gold-500, and gold-600 colors defined in tailwind.config.js to match the existing design system.

Modify App.tsx to conditionally render the LoginScreen component when the user is not authenticated. Import useInternetIdentity hook to check authentication state. Show LoginScreen when identity is null, otherwise render the existing app content (Header, pages, Footer). Ensure the authentication check happens before rendering any application data.

Verify that InternetIdentityProvider wraps the App component correctly to ensure authentication context is available throughout the component tree. No changes needed if already correctly wrapped, but review to confirm the provider hierarchy supports the new LoginScreen authentication flow.
